title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
content: RAG is a technique to improve LLM accuracy by retrieving relevant information from an external knowledge base (like Vector Search) and providing it to the model in the prompt. Vertex AI supports Grounding, allowing models to cite sources and reducing hallucinations. Grounding can connect to Google Search or custom data stores.

key_facts.definition: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for improving LLM accuracy
Connecting LLMs to verifiable information sources
